sentiment_score_definition: x <= -0.35: Bearish; -0.35 < x <= -0.15: Somewhat-Bearish; -0.15 < x < 0.15: Neutral; 0.15 <= x < 0.35: Somewhat_Bullish; x >= 0.35: Bullish
relevance_score_definition: 0 < x <= 1, with a higher score indicating higher relevance.

feed.title: iBio CFO Duran acquired $50k in shares on March 19
feed.summary: iBio's CFO, Felipe Duran, recently acquired 24,835 shares of the company's common stock for approximately $50,131 on March 19, 2026. This insider purchase follows a 162% surge in stock price over the last six months and occurred despite a recent 12.6% weekly drop. Analysts have set price targets between $4.20 and $7.00, indicating significant upside potential for the company.

feed.title: Ferrari Steps Up €3.5 Billion Buyback, Lifts Treasury Stake Above 9% of Capital
feed.summary: Ferrari is continuing its multi-year €3.5 billion share buyback program, having repurchased 629,741 shares for approximately €187.1 million between January 5, 2026, and March 20, 2026. This has increased its treasury holdings to 8.91% of common shares and 9.31% of total issued share capital. The buyback aims to optimize capital structure, enhance shareholder value, and reflects the company's confidence in its long-term prospects.

feed.title: Johnson & Johnson (JNJ) Advances Bladder Cancer Treatment with 89% Response Rate
feed.summary: Johnson & Johnson (JNJ) reported positive Phase 1 study results for an innovative bladder cancer treatment, Erda-iDRS, achieving an 89% complete response rate in patients with non-muscle-invasive bladder cancer. The trial met its primary safety goals, and the company also announced FDA approval for its TECNIS PureSee IOL for cataract surgery. J&J operates across Innovative Medicine, MedTech, and Consumer Health sectors.

feed.title: NetApp unveils new high-performance EF-Series Models
feed.summary: NetApp has introduced its next generation of EF-Series storage systems, the EF50 and EF80, designed to handle high-performance workloads such as AI, HPC, and transactional databases. These new models offer significant improvements in read and write throughput, power efficiency, and storage density, enabling customers to deploy and scale data-intensive applications more efficiently. The EF-Series aims to provide speed, scalability, and security while reducing data center complexity and operational overhead.

feed.title: Brown Advisory Mid-Cap Growth Strategy Exited Autodesk (ADSK) in Q4
feed.summary: Brown Advisory's Mid-Cap Growth Strategy divested its stake in Autodesk (ADSK) in Q4 2025, citing that the margin expansion thesis was already reflected in the share price and that more attractive opportunities exist elsewhere. The strategy underperformed its benchmark in Q4 2025 due to stock selection but was in line for the full year, partly due to not owning Palantir Technologies. The firm focuses on high-quality compounders with fair valuations, and while Autodesk is acknowledged, the firm sees greater promise in certain AI stocks.

feed.title: Abbott (ABT) Stock Rated Buy on Strong Diabetes Trial Results
feed.summary: Benchmark has reiterated a Buy rating and a $145 price target for Abbott Laboratories (ABT) following positive results from its FreeDM trial, which showed improved glucose control for Type 2 diabetes patients using FreeStyle Libre continuous glucose monitoring technology. These findings, supported by a second trial in Italy, highlight the potential for expanded insurance coverage for continuous glucose monitoring in Europe and suggest a possible similar expansion by CMS in the U.S. Abbott is well-positioned to benefit from this, as it is a leading provider of continuous glucose monitoring technology.

feed.title: The Home Depot Subsidiary SRS Distribution Enters into Agreement to Acquire Wholesale HVAC Distributor Mingledorff's
feed.summary: The Home Depot, through its subsidiary SRS Distribution, has agreed to acquire Mingledorff's, a leading wholesale distributor of HVAC equipment and supplies. This acquisition expands SRS Distribution's offerings into HVAC, a new vertical, and is expected to increase The Home Depot's total addressable market to $1.2 trillion. Mingledorff's will continue to operate under its current leadership and anticipates closing the transaction in the second quarter of fiscal 2026.

feed.title: Extraterritorial Application of the Digital Millennium Copyright Act
feed.summary: A recent court decision involving Cadence Design Systems found that the Digital Millennium Copyright Act (DMCA) can apply extraterritorially, giving broad protection to U.S. copyright holders. The judge ruled that if any part of the access control for copyrighted work runs through a U.S. server, circumvention is considered domestic conduct, establishing personal jurisdiction based on "effects" or consent through licensing agreements. This interpretation allows U.S. courts to address DMCA claims against foreign defendants even without direct U.S. contacts if their circumvention efforts interact with U.S.-based access controls.

feed.title: Differences between W2 and 1099 workers for small businesses
feed.summary: This article discusses the key differences between W-2 employees and 1099 independent contractors for small businesses. Laci Buzzelli from ADP explains how to classify workers correctly, emphasizing that 1099 workers typically run their own operations, handle their own expenses and taxes, and do not receive employee benefits, making them suitable for specialized or project-based work. W-2 employees, conversely, are on company payroll for ongoing work, have taxes withheld, and are eligible for benefits, with the article highlighting the importance of adhering to federal and state guidelines to avoid penalties.

feed.title: Gilead to Buy Ouro Medicines for $2.2 Billion. ‘Immune Reset’ Is Key to Future Gains.
feed.summary: Gilead Sciences is set to acquire Ouro Medicine for $2.18 billion, aiming to strengthen its autoimmune portfolio. This acquisition hinges on Ouro Medicine's lead clinical-stage drug candidate, an immune therapy called gamgertamig, which Gilead plans to co-develop with Galapagos. This move is a strategic bet on "immune reset" therapies for future growth.

feed.title: Thermo Fisher (NYSE: TMO) closes $8.875B Clario deal with EPS accretion
feed.summary: Thermo Fisher Scientific has completed its acquisition of Clario Holdings, Inc. for $8.875 billion in cash, with potential additional earn-out payments. This acquisition is expected to enhance Thermo Fisher's clinical research data capabilities, add $0.45 to adjusted EPS in the first year, and generate approximately $175 million in adjusted operating income synergies by year five. Clario's solutions, which integrate clinical trial endpoint data, have supported a significant portion of FDA and EMA novel drug approvals over the last decade.

feed.title: Tudor Investment Corp ET AL Has $6.75 Million Position in Schrodinger, Inc. $SDGR
feed.summary: Tudor Investment Corp ET AL significantly increased its stake in Schrodinger, Inc. (NASDAQ:SDGR) by 2,530.6% during the third quarter, now owning 336,379 shares valued at approximately $6.75 million. Despite beating quarterly earnings and revenue expectations, Schrodinger remains unprofitable with negative margins, holding an average analyst rating of "Hold" and a price target of $21.13. Recent insider selling has occurred, but institutional investors hold a substantial 79.05% of the stock.

feed.title: Tudor Investment Corp ET AL Has $8.11 Million Position in NVR, Inc. $NVR
feed.summary: Tudor Investment Corp ET AL significantly increased its stake in NVR, Inc. during Q3 2026, boosting its holdings by 1,245.3% to 1,009 shares valued at $8.11 million. This increase contributes to institutional investors and hedge funds owning 83.67% of the company's stock. NVR also reported strong Q3 earnings, surpassing revenue and EPS estimates, and authorized a $750 million share repurchase program, indicating management's belief that shares are undervalued.

feed.title: Introducing Automotive-Qualified System-in-Package Hybrid MCU for Automotive and E-Mobility Human-Machine Interface Applications
feed.summary: Microchip Technology has unveiled the AEC-Q100 Grade 2-qualified SAM9X75D5M System-in-Package (SiP), a hybrid MCU designed for automotive and e-mobility Human-Machine Interface (HMI) applications. This SiP combines a microprocessor's processing power with embedded memory, simplifying development and addressing the growing demand for sophisticated graphics in vehicles. It offers a single-chip solution to mitigate memory procurement risks and supports various display and connectivity options for applications like digital cockpit clusters and EV chargers.

feed.title: Tounjian Advisory Partners LLC Has $2.67 Million Holdings in Johnson & Johnson $JNJ
feed.summary: Tounjian Advisory Partners LLC significantly reduced its stake in Johnson & Johnson ($JNJ) by 26.4% in the fourth quarter, selling 4,626 shares and retaining 12,898 shares valued at $2.67 million. This move positions JNJ as the 25th largest holding in Tounjian Advisory Partners LLC's portfolio. Despite this reduction, other institutional investors have mostly increased their holdings, and analysts maintain a "Moderate Buy" rating for Johnson & Johnson with an average target price of $236.91.

feed.title: Triumph Capital Management Has $293,000 Stock Holdings in International Business Machines Corporation $IBM
feed.summary: Triumph Capital Management significantly reduced its stake in IBM by 78.4% in Q3, now holding 1,039 shares valued at $293,000. Despite this, major institutions like Vanguard and State Street remain heavily invested, contributing to IBM's 58.96% institutional ownership. Wall Street analysts generally maintain a "Moderate Buy" rating with a consensus target of $314.60, as IBM continues to report strong earnings and positive developments in AI, indicated by recent partnerships and its presence at the Masters Tournament.

feed.title: Tudor Investment Corp ET AL Makes New Investment in Globe Life Inc. $GL
feed.summary: Tudor Investment Corp ET AL has made a new investment in Globe Life Inc. (NYSE:GL), purchasing 51,392 shares valued at approximately $7.35 million in Q3. This new stake contributes to institutional investors collectively owning about 81.61% of Globe Life. While institutional ownership increased, corporate insiders have been net sellers, offloading over 82,000 shares worth $12.04 million in the past three months.

feed.title: United adds lie-flat seats on domestic jets in 250-plane expansion
feed.summary: United Airlines plans to add over 250 new aircraft by April 2028, the most by any airline in a two-year span, focusing on enhancing its premium customer experience. This expansion includes the introduction of A321neo "Coastliner" and A321XLR narrowbodies with lie-flat United Polaris seats on domestic and international routes, alongside 787-9 Dreamliners with "Elevated" interiors and CRJ450 regional jets. The move aims to modernize its fleet, replace older aircraft, and significantly increase premium seating and amenities across its network.

feed.title: Thermo Fisher Scientific Completes Acquisition of Clario Holdings, Inc.
feed.summary: Thermo Fisher Scientific (NYSE: TMO) has completed its acquisition of Clario Holdings, Inc., a leading provider of endpoint data solutions for clinical trials, for $8.875 billion in cash plus potential earnout payments. This acquisition aims to strengthen Thermo Fisher's position in serving pharma and biotech customers by enhancing its clinical research offerings and enabling faster, more informed drug development. The company anticipates the acquisition to be accretive to its adjusted operating margin and contribute $0.45 of adjusted diluted EPS in the first year, with expected synergies of approximately $175 million in adjusted operating income by year five.

feed.title: Synchrony to Announce First Quarter 2026 Financial Results on April 21, 2026
feed.summary: Synchrony (NYSE: SYF) is scheduled to release its first-quarter 2026 financial results on Tuesday, April 21, 2026. The earnings release and presentation materials will be available on the company's investor relations website at approximately 6:00 a.m. Eastern Time. A conference call to discuss the results will follow at 8:00 a.m. ET, with a live audio webcast and replay accessible via the same website.

feed.title: Synchrony will post first-quarter results at 6 a.m. before April 21 call
feed.summary: Synchrony (NYSE: SYF) is set to release its first-quarter 2026 financial results on Tuesday, April 21, 2026, at approximately 6:00 a.m. Eastern Time. Following the release of the earnings and presentation materials on the company's Investor Relations website, a conference call to discuss the results will be held at 8:00 a.m. Eastern Time on the same day. Historically, similar earnings-date announcements have led to modest stock movements for SYF.

feed.title: Lead Plaintiff Deadlines in Shareholder Class Action Lawsuits Against REGENXBIO Inc. (RGNX), Franklin BSP Realty Trust, Inc. (FBRT), and Aquestive Therapeutics, Inc. (AQST) Announced by Holzer & Holzer, LLC
feed.summary: Holzer & Holzer, LLC is reminding investors of the upcoming lead plaintiff deadlines in class action lawsuits against REGENXBIO Inc. (RGNX), Franklin BSP Realty Trust, Inc. (FBRT), and Aquestive Therapeutics, Inc. (AQST). Investors who suffered significant losses during specified periods for each company are encouraged to contact the firm to discuss their legal rights. The deadlines to seek appointment as lead plaintiff are April 14, 2026, for RGNX, April 27, 2026, for FBRT, and May 4, 2026, for AQST.

feed.title: New PPG tool helps ship operators spot marine coating costs
feed.summary: PPG has launched InsightsNav, an analytics platform designed to help shipowners and operators optimize their seastock coatings purchasing data. The tool provides enhanced spend transparency, improves forecasting, and identifies cost-saving opportunities through real-time, interactive dashboards. This allows marine professionals to make more informed decisions by analyzing historical trends and optimizing procurement strategies.

feed.title: Ransomware recovery push: Commvault, NetApp join forces
feed.summary: NetApp and Commvault have formed a strategic alliance to enhance cyber resilience and data protection for enterprises, offering a unified solution for rapid recovery across hybrid environments. This partnership combines Commvault's recovery capabilities with NetApp's intelligent data platform, including AI-driven ransomware detection, to create an end-to-end cyber resilience solution. The collaboration aims to provide a closed-loop recovery architecture, minimizing data loss, accelerating recoveries, and supporting compliance in an AI-driven world.

feed.title: NetApp and Elastio Announce Partnership to Deliver Defense-in-Depth Ransomware Resilience
feed.summary: NetApp and Elastio have partnered to enhance cyber resilience by integrating Elastio's Provable Recovery Control into NetApp's Ransomware Resilience Service. This collaboration aims to provide a layered defense against ransomware, extending security from production storage to recovery data, and ensuring continuous verification of backup cleanliness. The new service will perform deep file inspection of ONTAP snapshots to detect advanced ransomware and malware that may have evaded initial detection.

feed.title: Every MLB strikeout now sends $20 to cancer research under AbbVie deal
feed.summary: AbbVie announced a multi-year partnership with Major League Baseball to expand its "Striking Out Cancer" initiative, donating $20 per strikeout up to $1 million annually to Stand Up To Cancer. Starting March 25, 2026, the league-wide program aims to raise cancer awareness and support research, with AbbVie also presenting the 2026 Wild Card Series. This move reflects AbbVie's commitment to ESG and brand equity, though its financial impact is expected to be minimal.

feed.title: Holzer & Holzer, LLC Reminds Investors of April 13, 2026
feed.summary: Holzer & Holzer, LLC is reminding investors of the April 13, 2026, deadline to seek appointment as lead plaintiff in class action lawsuits against Kyndryl Holdings, Inc. (KD) and uniQure N.V. (QURE). The firm alleges that both companies made materially false or misleading statements to investors within specified timeframes. Investors who suffered significant losses are encouraged to contact the firm to discuss their legal rights.

feed.title: New York Stock Exchange and Securitize Agree to Memorandum of Understanding to Support Tokenized Securities
feed.summary: The New York Stock Exchange (NYSE) and Securitize have announced a collaboration to develop tokenized securities markets. This partnership involves Securitize becoming the first digital transfer agent eligible to mint blockchain-native securities for NYSE’s upcoming Digital Trading Platform. The agreement focuses on establishing robust regulatory, operational, and technological standards for institutional-grade tokenized securities infrastructure, leveraging Securitize's expertise in digital asset infrastructure and transfer agency.

feed.title: Kalshi Is Partnering With FIS to Reach ‘Next Wave’ of Prediction Market Growth
feed.summary: Kalshi, a privately held company recently valued at $22 billion, is partnering with financial services technology provider FIS to expand its prediction market offerings. This collaboration aims to help Kalshi reach the "next wave" of growth in the prediction market space, which has seen significant disruption in the financial world. The partnership suggests prediction platforms may require assistance from established financial institutions to manage the underlying financial infrastructure for trading.

feed.title: FedEx To Offer Faster Delivery with Launch of FedEx SameDay® Local
feed.summary: FedEx Corp. has announced the launch of FedEx SameDay® Local, a new delivery service offering customers the choice of two-hour or end-of-day delivery directly at checkout. This service, developed in collaboration with OneRail, connects FedEx customers to a national network of over 1,000 delivery providers and aims to meet growing consumer demand for flexible and convenient delivery options. The initiative expands FedEx's delivery portfolio to support a range of customer preferences and enhance retailer success through improved visibility and tracking.

feed.title: China's $120 Billion Metals Bet Raises Supply Risks, Study
feed.summary: A new study by Climate Energy Finance (CEF) reveals that China has invested over $120 billion in overseas critical mineral projects since 2023, significantly strengthening its control over global raw material supply chains. This strategic expansion, particularly in Africa, Latin America, and Southeast Asia, includes lithium, copper, nickel, rare earths, and bauxite. China's efforts raise concerns about supply risks for Western nations and provide it with substantial influence over pricing and availability in markets crucial for decarbonization, impacting both national security and economic competitiveness.

feed.title: A single chip for car screens up to 10 inches aims to cut design risk
feed.summary: Microchip Technology has released an automotive-qualified System-in-Package (SiP) hybrid MCU, the SAM9X75D5M, designed for automotive and e-mobility Human-Machine Interface (HMI) applications. This single chip integrates an Arm926EJ-S MPU with 512 Mbit DDR2, supporting displays up to 10 inches and XGA resolution, simplifying PCB design and mitigating supply chain risks associated with discrete memory components. The product is available now for $9.12 in 5,000-unit quantities, with larger memory variants available for sampling, aiming to reduce design complexity and accelerate time-to-market for automotive HMI solutions.

feed.title: Fertilizers And Food At Risk - Northern Trust - Commentaries
feed.summary: This article by Ryan Boyle of Northern Trust discusses the critical role of fertilizers in global food production, drawing parallels to the historical "Guano Wars." It highlights how modern synthetic fertilizer production, particularly nitrogen-based urea derived from natural gas, has created a chokepoint in global supply chains. Recent disruptions, such as an attack on Iran, are causing significant concerns for agricultural yields and could lead to higher food prices, reminiscent of previous supply shocks caused by sanctions on Russian and Belarusian exports.

feed.title: Hasbro Stock: Is HAS Outperforming the Consumer Discretionary Sector?
feed.summary: Hasbro, Inc. (HAS) has demonstrated strong performance, with its stock gaining 14.2% over the past three months and 53.5% over the past 52 weeks, significantly outperforming the State Street Consumer Discretionary Select Sector SPDR ETF (XLY). The company's Q4 results were robust, driven by popular brands and new licensing deals, leading to strong analyst sentiment with a "Strong Buy" consensus and a potential upside of 21.6%.

feed.title: Wall Street's Most Accurate Analysts Spotlight On 3 Utilities Stocks With Over 3% Dividend Yields
feed.summary: This article highlights three utility stocks with over 3% dividend yields, attracting investors during market uncertainty. The stocks featured are CMS Energy (NYSE:CMS), Xcel Energy (NASDAQ:XEL), and PPL Corp (NYSE:PPL), along with recent analyst ratings and news for each. The analysis includes accurate analyst ratings from Keybanc, Barclays, UBS, BMO Capital, and Mizuho.

feed.title: Volume spike pushes HP Inc. to CHF 15.25: HPQ.SW (SIX) 24 Mar 2026 trading cue
feed.summary: HP Inc. (HPQ.SW) experienced a significant intraday volume spike, causing its stock to drop to CHF 15.25 on the SIX exchange on March 24, 2026, a -23.48% loss. This event, driven by a 33.33x relative volume, suggests a major liquidation or block trade rather than gradual selling. While fundamentals show strong free cash flow and a low PE, liquidity measures are tight, and Meyka AI projects a potential yearly downside of -16.03%, advising caution for traders and long-term investors alike.

feed.title: Here Are Tuesday’s Top Wall Street Analyst Research Calls: Alaska Airlines, ConocoPhillips, Commvault Systems, CoreWeave, Diamondback Energy, JFrog Ltd, Microsoft, and More
feed.summary: This article summarizes top Wall Street analyst upgrades, downgrades, and initiations for Tuesday, March 24, 2026. It also reviews the market's performance, including a rebound on Monday due to news of a potential diplomatic breakthrough with Iran, and the current status of oil, gold, and cryptocurrency markets. Key company mentions include upgrades for CoreWeave, Ecolab, JFrog Ltd., Jinko Solar, and Ralph Lauren, and initiations for Alaska Airlines, Commvault Systems, ConocoPhillips, Diamondback Energy, and Microsoft.

feed.title: Salem Investment Counselors Inc. Reduces Stake in T. Rowe Price Group
feed.summary: Salem Investment Counselors Inc. has significantly reduced its stake in T. Rowe Price Group by 47% during the fourth quarter of 2025, now holding 41,256 shares valued at $4.2 million. This move suggests a potential shift in investor sentiment regarding the asset manager's future outlook. Investors are advised to monitor further institutional ownership changes in T. Rowe Price Group stock.

feed.title: Let the Games Begin: Markets vs. The Fed
feed.summary: The article discusses the ongoing tension between financial markets and the Federal Reserve regarding interest rate policy and future economic direction. Markets are second-guessing the Fed's stance, particularly concerning the number of rate cuts this year, while the Fed faces uncertainty regarding inflation versus employment focuses. Geopolitical risks and their impact on global oil prices are also highlighted as significant factors influencing the economic outlook and the Fed's decisions.

feed.title: Invesco and Superstate Advance Institutional Tokenization Through USTB Partnership
feed.summary: Invesco, a global asset manager with $2.2 trillion in AUM, is partnering with Superstate, a financial technology firm, to become the investment manager for Superstate's tokenized short-duration U.S. treasuries fund, USTB. This collaboration makes Invesco the first asset manager to utilize Superstate's digital transfer agent infrastructure, aiming to enhance institutional tokenization. The transition is expected in Q2 2026, after which USTB will be renamed Invesco Short Duration US Government Securities Fund, maintaining its current ticker and onchain infrastructure.

feed.title: Corebridge Financial announces resignation of two directors following AIG stake reduction
feed.summary: Corebridge Financial (NYSE:CRBG) announced that two directors, Rose Marie Glazer and Adam Burk, have resigned from its Board of Directors, effective March 24, 2026. This move follows the reduction of American International Group, Inc.'s (AIG) stake in Corebridge Financial to approximately 5% after a $750 million common stock repurchase. Consequently, AIG waived its right to designate board members, leading to a planned reduction in Corebridge Financial's board size from thirteen to eleven directors.

feed.title: Sherwin-Williams Expands Kentucky Plant to Meet Roofing Demand
feed.summary: Sherwin-Williams Coil Coatings has expanded its Bowling Green, Kentucky manufacturing facility to meet the growing demand in metal roofing and construction markets. This expansion increases overall capacity by 60% compared to 2025 levels, adds automation, and improves efficiency, allowing for product delivery in less than five days. The upgrades are expected to strengthen supply chain reliability for its durable, weather-resistant coatings.

feed.title: JGP Wealth Management LLC Has $2.29 Million Stock Holdings in Pool Corporation $POOL
feed.summary: JGP Wealth Management LLC significantly reduced its stake in Pool Corporation (NASDAQ:POOL) by 60.3% in Q4, leading to holdings valued at $2.29 million. feed.title: QQMG Stock Fund Price and Chart — NASDAQ:QQMG

It details the fund's investment strategy, which focuses on NASDAQ-100 stocks with an ESG overlay, and answers frequently asked questions about ETFs and QQMG's specific characteristics.

feed.title: PMO SEC Filings - Putnam Municipal Opportunities 10-K, 10-Q, 8-K Forms
feed.summary: This article provides a comprehensive overview of SEC filings for Putnam Municipal Opportunities (PMO), a closed-end municipal bond fund. It details the types of regulatory documents available, such as 10-K, 10-Q, and 8-K forms, and explains how these reports offer insights into the fund's investment objectives, portfolio holdings, and share repurchase activities. The page also highlights recent specific filings, including a small round-trip trade by Merrill Lynch and a shareholder vote on board governance.

feed.title: PLUG FINAL DEADLINE: ROSEN, A HIGHLY RECOGNIZED LAW FIRM, Encourages Plug Power Inc. Investors ...
feed.summary: Rosen Law Firm is encouraging investors of Plug Power Inc. (NASDAQ: PLUG) who purchased securities between January 17, 2025, and November 13, 2025, to join a class action lawsuit. The deadline to serve as lead plaintiff is April 3, 2026. The lawsuit alleges that Plug Power Inc. made false and misleading statements regarding its prospects for securing U.S. Department of Energy loan funds and its hydrogen production facilities.
